ucs.title: [LLM] Silk Typhoon (HAFNIUM) Exchange web shell drop — w3wp.exe writing ASPX into OWA/ECP virtual directories (ProxyLogon-style chain)
ucs.description: Hunts the signature Silk Typhoon / HAFNIUM (Operation Exchange Marauder) tradecraft: post-exploitation of on-prem Exchange (ProxyLogon CVE-2021-26855 + CVE-2021-27065 chain and successor n-day chains they have re-used through 2024–2025), where the Exchange worker process (w3wp.exe) writes an .aspx/.ashx web shell — China Chopper, ChinaChopper-style one-liner, or 'Antsword' variants — into Exchange front-end virtual directories, then spawns LOLBin children (cmd.exe, powershell.exe, procdump.exe, net.exe) under the IIS pool identity. This combination (IIS-worker → ASPX-drop-in-Exchange-path → re
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=true count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime from datamodel=Endpoint.Filesystem where (Filesystem.action=created OR Filesystem.action=modified) Filesystem.process_name="w3wp.exe" (Filesystem.file_name="*.aspx" OR Filesystem.file_name="*.ashx" OR Filesystem.file_name="*.asmx") (Filesystem.file_path="*\\FrontEnd\\HttpProxy\\owa\\auth\\*" OR Filesystem.file_path="*\\FrontEnd\\HttpProxy\\ecp\\auth\\*" OR Filesystem.file_path="*\\ClientAccess\\Owa\\auth\\*" OR Filesystem.file_path="*\\inetpub\\wwwroot\\aspnet_client\\*" OR Filesystem.file_path="*\\V15\\FrontEnd\\HttpProxy\\*") by host Filesystem.dest Filesystem.user Filesystem.file_path Filesystem.file_name Filesystem.file_hash Filesystem.process_name | `drop_dm_object_name(Filesystem)` | rename dest as host_drop | join type=left host_drop [ | tstats summariesonly=true count as suspChildren values(Processes.process_name) as childProc values(Processes.process) as childCmd from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where Processes.parent_process_name="w3wp.exe" (Processes.process_name="cmd.exe" OR Processes.process_name="powershell.exe" OR Processes.process_name="pwsh.exe" OR Processes.process_name="mshta.exe" OR Processes.process_name="rundll32.exe" OR Processes.process_name="regsvr32.exe" OR Processes.process_name="cscript.exe" OR Processes.process_name="wscript.exe" OR Processes.process_name="net.exe" OR Processes.process_name="net1.exe" OR Processes.process_name="nltest.exe" OR Processes.process_name="whoami.exe" OR Processes.process_name="procdump.exe" OR Processes.process_name="procdump64.exe" OR Processes.process_name="csc.exe") by Processes.dest | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` | rename dest as host_drop ] | where suspChildren>0 OR firstTime!=lastTime | convert ctime(firstTime) ctime(lastTime)
ucs.kql:
let ExchangePathPatterns = dynamic([@"\FrontEnd\HttpProxy\owa\auth\", @"\FrontEnd\HttpProxy\ecp\auth\", @"\FrontEnd\HttpProxy\aspnet_client\", @"\ClientAccess\Owa\auth\", @"\inetpub\wwwroot\aspnet_client\", @"\V15\FrontEnd\HttpProxy\"]);
let ShellExt = dynamic([".aspx",".ashx",".asmx"]);
let SuspChildren = dynamic(["cmd.exe","powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","mshta.exe","rundll32.exe","regsvr32.exe","cscript.exe","wscript.exe","net.exe","net1.exe","nltest.exe","whoami.exe","systeminfo.exe","ipconfig.exe","procdump.exe","procdump64.exe","csc.exe"]);
let ShellDrops =
    DeviceFileEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(7d)
    | where ActionType in ("FileCreated","FileModified","FileRenamed")
    | where InitiatingProcessFileName =~ "w3wp.exe"
    | where FileName endswith ".aspx" or FileName endswith ".ashx" or FileName endswith ".asmx"
    | where FolderPath has_any (ExchangePathPatterns)
    | project Timestamp, DeviceId, DeviceName, Evt = "web_shell_dropped",
              AppPool = InitiatingProcessCommandLine, ShellPath = FolderPath,
              ShellFile = FileName, SHA256, InitiatingProcessAccountName;
let WorkerChildren =
    DeviceProcessEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(7d)
    | where InitiatingProcessFileName =~ "w3wp.exe"
    | where InitiatingProcessCommandLine has_any ("MSExchange","OwaAppPool","EcpAppPool","RpcProxyFrontEndAppPool","AutodiscoverAppPool")
    | where FileName in~ (SuspChildren)
    | project Timestamp, DeviceId, DeviceName, Evt = "iis_worker_spawned_lolbin",
              AppPool = InitiatingProcessCommandLine, ShellPath = "",
              ShellFile = FileName, SHA256, ChildCmd = ProcessCommandLine,
              AccountName, IsInitiatingProcessRemoteSession;
ShellDrops
| union kind=outer WorkerChildren
| summarize FirstSeen = min(Timestamp), LastSeen = max(Timestamp),
            Evidence = make_set(Evt),
            DroppedShells = make_set_if(strcat(ShellPath, ShellFile), Evt == "web_shell_dropped"),
            ChildCmds = make_set_if(ChildCmd, Evt == "iis_worker_spawned_lolbin"),
            EventCount = count()
            by DeviceId, DeviceName
| where array_length(Evidence) >= 1
| order by FirstSeen desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
let ExchangePathPatterns = dynamic([@"\FrontEnd\HttpProxy\owa\auth\", @"\FrontEnd\HttpProxy\ecp\auth\", @"\ClientAccess\Owa\auth\", @"\inetpub\wwwroot\aspnet_client\", @"\V15\FrontEnd\HttpProxy\"]);
let SuspChildren = dynamic(["cmd.exe","powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","mshta.exe","rundll32.exe","regsvr32.exe","cscript.exe","wscript.exe","net.exe","net1.exe","nltest.exe","whoami.exe","procdump.exe","procdump64.exe","csc.exe"]);
let ShellDrops =
    ImFileEvent
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
    | where EventType in ("FileCreated","FileModified")
    | where ActingProcessName endswith "w3wp.exe"
    | where TargetFileName endswith ".aspx" or TargetFileName endswith ".ashx" or TargetFileName endswith ".asmx"
    | where TargetFilePath has_any (ExchangePathPatterns)
    | project TimeGenerated, DvcHostname, Evt = "web_shell_dropped",
              ShellPath = TargetFilePath, ShellFile = TargetFileName,
              SHA256 = TargetFileSHA256, ActorUsername;
let WorkerChildren =
    SecurityEvent
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
    | where EventID == 4688
    | where ParentProcessName endswith "w3wp.exe"
    | extend Image = tolower(NewProcessName)
    | extend ChildBin = tostring(split(Image, "\\")[-1])
    | where ChildBin in~ (SuspChildren)
    | project TimeGenerated, DvcHostname = Computer, Evt = "iis_worker_spawned_lolbin",
              ShellPath = "", ShellFile = ChildBin,
              SHA256 = "", ActorUsername = SubjectUserName, ChildCmd = CommandLine;
ShellDrops
| union kind=outer WorkerChildren
| summarize FirstSeen = min(TimeGenerated), LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated),
            Evidence = make_set(Evt),
            DroppedShells = make_set_if(strcat(ShellPath, ShellFile), Evt == "web_shell_dropped"),
            ChildCmds = make_set_if(ChildCmd, Evt == "iis_worker_spawned_lolbin"),
            EventCount = count()
            by DvcHostname
| where array_length(Evidence) >= 1
| order by FirstSeen desc
ucs.sigma_yaml:
title: Silk Typhoon / HAFNIUM Exchange Web Shell Drop by w3wp.exe
id: 8f3b6d22-3aab-4d2e-b7e0-2f54d7c95e11
status: experimental
description: Detects an Exchange IIS worker process (w3wp.exe) writing an ASPX/ASHX/ASMX file into a known Exchange front-end virtual directory — the signature post-exploitation behaviour for Silk Typhoon (HAFNIUM, Operation Exchange Marauder) ProxyLogon-style chains.
references:
  - https://www.microsoft.com/security/blog/2021/03/02/hafnium-targeting-exchange-servers/
  - https://attack.mitre.org/groups/G0125/
author: SOC Detection Engineering
date: 2026/05/13
logsource:
  product: windows
  category: file_event
detection:
  selection_proc:
    Image|endswith: '\w3wp.exe'
  selection_file_ext:
    TargetFilename|endswith:
      - '.aspx'
      - '.ashx'
      - '.asmx'
  selection_file_path:
    TargetFilename|contains:
      - '\FrontEnd\HttpProxy\owa\auth\'
      - '\FrontEnd\HttpProxy\ecp\auth\'
      - '\FrontEnd\HttpProxy\aspnet_client\'
      - '\ClientAccess\Owa\auth\'
      - '\inetpub\wwwroot\aspnet_client\'
      - '\V15\FrontEnd\HttpProxy\'
  condition: selection_proc and selection_file_ext and selection_file_path
fields:
  - Image
  - TargetFilename
  - User
  - Hashes
falsepositives:
  - Legitimate Exchange Cumulative Update / Security Update installs (bounded, MSI-signed)
  - Microsoft-deployed OAB regeneration touching .aspx (rare, narrow paths)
level: high
tags:
  - attack.initial_access
  - attack.t1190
  - attack.persistence
  - attack.t1505.003
  - detection.threat_hunting
ucs.rationale: This is THE Silk Typhoon / HAFNIUM cluster signature. Microsoft, Volexity, Mandiant and CrowdStrike (who track this actor as MURKY PANDA / Operation Exchange Marauder) all anchor on the exact behaviour: w3wp.exe writing .aspx web shells into OWA/ECP/aspnet_client paths after exploiting an Exchange n-day. Legitimate Exchange code paths almost never have the IIS pool identity write a new .aspx into

_field_issues.message: `IsInitiatingProcessRemoteSession` is not a canonical column of DeviceFileEvents, DeviceProcessEvents. Did you mean `InitiatingProcessTokenElevation`?

ucs.title: [LLM] Silk Typhoon cloud lateral-movement — secret/cert added to existing service principal followed by Graph mail/file read from new ASN
ucs.description: Hunts the post-2024 Silk Typhoon pivot (Microsoft Threat Intelligence, March 2025) into IT supply-chain and cloud tenants: after stealing on-prem admin credentials (often via Entra Connect server or AADConnect sync account), the actor adds a new client secret or certificate (`keyCredentials`/`passwordCredentials`) to an existing legitimate first-party-looking service principal — a quieter persistence than registering a new app — then signs that SP in to Microsoft Graph from previously-unseen infrastructure (often CovertNetwork-1658 / Quad7 proxies) and enumerates / exfiltrates mail and SharePo
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=true count min(_time) as credAddTime values(Change.user) as Initiator values(Change.object) as TargetSP values(Change.object_id) as TargetSPId from datamodel=Change where Change.change_type=AAA Change.object_category="Service Principal" (Change.action=updated OR Change.action=modified) (Change.command="Add service principal credentials" OR Change.command="Update application*Certificates and secrets management" OR Change.command="Update service principal") by Change.object_id Change.user | `drop_dm_object_name(Change)` | rename object_id as TargetSPId_key | join type=inner TargetSPId_key [ | tstats summariesonly=true values(Authentication.src) as SpSrcIP values(Authentication.src_country) as SpCountry count as SpSignIns from datamodel=Authentication where Authentication.app="Microsoft Graph" Authentication.user_type="ServicePrincipal" Authentication.action=success by Authentication.user_id | `drop_dm_object_name(Authentication)` | rename user_id as TargetSPId_key ] | where SpSignIns > 0 AND credAddTime < relative_time(now(),"-0m") | eval timeSinceCredAdd_hours=round((now()-credAddTime)/3600,2) | where timeSinceCredAdd_hours <= 72
ucs.kql:
let CredentialAddActions = dynamic(["Add service principal credentials","Update application – Certificates and secrets management","Update service principal","Add owner to service principal","Add owner to application"]);
let SuspectSpCredAdds =
    CloudAppEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(7d)
    | where ActionType in (CredentialAddActions)
    | where Application in~ ("Office 365","Microsoft Azure Active Directory","Microsoft Entra ID")
    | extend Raw = parse_json(RawEventData)
    | extend TargetSP = tostring(Raw.Target_1.ID),
             TargetSPName = tostring(Raw.Target_1.Name),
             ModifiedProps = tostring(Raw.ModifiedProperties),
             Initiator = tostring(Raw.UserId)
    | where ModifiedProps has_any ("KeyCredentials","PasswordCredentials","keyId")
    | project CredAddTime = Timestamp, TargetSP, TargetSPName, Initiator,
              InitiatorIP = IPAddress, InitiatorCountry = CountryCode;
AADSignInEventsBeta
| where Timestamp > ago(7d)
| where TokenIssuerType == "AzureAD"
| where Application has_any ("Microsoft Graph","Office 365 Exchange Online","SharePoint")
| where ApplicationId == "00000003-0000-0000-c000-000000000000"
   or ResourceId == "00000003-0000-0000-c000-000000000000"
   or ResourceId == "00000002-0000-0ff1-ce00-000000000000"
| where AccountObjectId in ((SuspectSpCredAdds | project TargetSP))
| join kind=inner SuspectSpCredAdds on $left.AccountObjectId == $right.TargetSP
| where Timestamp between (CredAddTime .. CredAddTime + 72h)
| where ErrorCode == 0
| where IPAddress != InitiatorIP or Country != InitiatorCountry or IsAnonymousProxy == true
| project CredAddTime, SignInTime = Timestamp,
          DelayHours = datetime_diff('hour', Timestamp, CredAddTime),
          TargetSP, TargetSPName, Initiator,
          CredAddSrcIP = InitiatorIP, CredAddCountry = InitiatorCountry,
          SpSignInIP = IPAddress, SpSignInCountry = Country,
          IsAnonymousProxy, Application, ResourceDisplayName
| order by SignInTime desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
let CredAddOps = dynamic(["Add service principal credentials","Update application – Certificates and secrets management","Update service principal","Update application"]);
let SuspectSpCredAdds =
    AuditLogs
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
    | where OperationName in (CredAddOps)
    | where Result == "success"
    | mv-expand TargetResources
    | extend TargetType = tostring(TargetResources.type),
             TargetSPId = tostring(TargetResources.id),
             TargetSPName = tostring(TargetResources.displayName),
             ModifiedProps = tostring(TargetResources.modifiedProperties)
    | where TargetType in ("ServicePrincipal","Application")
    | where ModifiedProps has_any ("KeyCredentials","PasswordCredentials","keyId","customKeyIdentifier")
    | extend Initiator = coalesce(tostring(parse_json(tostring(InitiatedBy)).user.userPrincipalName),
                                  tostring(parse_json(tostring(InitiatedBy)).app.displayName))
    | extend InitiatorIP = tostring(parse_json(tostring(InitiatedBy)).user.ipAddress)
    | project CredAddTime = TimeGenerated, TargetSPId, TargetSPName, Initiator, InitiatorIP;
AADServicePrincipalSignInLogs
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| where ResultType == 0
| where ResourceDisplayName has_any ("Microsoft Graph","Office 365 Exchange Online","SharePoint","Microsoft.Graph")
| join kind=inner SuspectSpCredAdds on $left.ServicePrincipalId == $right.TargetSPId
| where TimeGenerated between (CredAddTime .. CredAddTime + 72h)
| extend SpSignInCountry = tostring(parse_json(tostring(Location)))
| where IPAddress != InitiatorIP or isempty(InitiatorIP)
| project CredAddTime, SignInTime = TimeGenerated,
          DelayHours = datetime_diff('hour', TimeGenerated, CredAddTime),
          TargetSPId, TargetSPName, Initiator, InitiatorIP,
          SpSignInIP = IPAddress, SpSignInCountry, ResourceDisplayName, AppId
| order by SignInTime desc
ucs.rationale: Microsoft Threat Intelligence's March 2025 Silk Typhoon write-up explicitly calls out this chain: the actor moves from on-prem (often via the AAD/Entra Connect sync server they compromised through Exchange) into the cloud tenant by adding their own secret/cert to an EXISTING legitimate-looking service principal — preferring credential-injection to new-app registration because it blends with admin
